title: La Routine Quotidiana — Lezione 3: Le Azioni della Mattina

learning_objectives.foundational: Students name 5+ morning routine actions using picture support
learning_objectives.on_track: Students describe their own morning routine in 4+ complete sentences
learning_objectives.extended: Students compare two different morning routines (theirs vs. a character's) using temporal connectors

activities.description: Total Physical Response (TPR) — teacher mimes morning actions, students guess and repeat in Italian
Students sequence picture cards of morning routine, then write sentences describing each step
Students write their own morning routine (differentiated by tier)
2 students share orally; class identifies temporal connectors used

assessment_evidence: Written morning routine description (collected, not graded — formative)
differentiation_notes: This teacher ALWAYS gives foundational students visual scaffolds + word banks. Extended students ALWAYS get open-ended prompts with a linguistic challenge (here: reflexive verbs). The on_track group has scaffolds available but not required — choice-based.
